Settings.title: Settings
Settings.subtitle: General configuration of the application.
Settings.saveError: Could not save configuration. Please retry.
Settings.loadError: Could not load current configuration. Defaults shown.
Settings.loadErrorDescription: The server did not return the current settings. Check that the API is reachable, then retry.

uploads.title: Uploads
uploads.description: Limits and defaults for file transfers.

persistence.label: Enable persistence
persistence.description: If disabled, files are sent using a STUN/TURN server and are not stored on the server. This means they can only be downloaded while the sender is online.

default_expiration.label: Default expiration (e.g. 15m, 24h)
default_expiration.description: Default lifetime for shared files. Users can change their own default.

allow_multiple_downloads.label: Allow multiple downloads per file
allow_multiple_downloads.description: If disabled, each file can only be downloaded once.

default_download_count.label: Default download count limit
default_download_count.description: Default number of downloads allowed per file. Users can change their own default.

max_download_count.label: Max download count limit (0 for unlimited)

require_password.label: Require password by default
require_password.description: Force users to set a password on every transfer.

activate_rate_limit.label: Enable rate limiting
activate_rate_limit.description: Apply per-hour caps on key generation and uploads.

max_generation_key_per_hour.label: Max key generations per hour per IP
max_generation_key_per_hour.description: A key is a partial identifier used to recognize a client and apply per-client limits. This caps how many new keys a single IP can request per hour, to prevent a client from rotating keys to bypass per-key limits.

max_upload_per_hour_per_key.label: Max uploads per hour per key
max_upload_per_hour_per_key.description: Maximum number of uploads allowed per hour for a single client key. The main per-client rate limit.

max_upload_per_hour_per_ip.label: Max uploads per hour per IP
max_upload_per_hour_per_ip.description: Maximum number of uploads allowed per hour from a single IP address. A second line of defense if a client tries to rotate keys.

max_upload_per_hour.label: Max uploads per hour (global)
max_upload_per_hour.description: Global cap across the whole instance. Protects the server from overload regardless of clients.

Hero.description: Flick generates a short code your contact enters to download. No account required.

Features.instantBody: Drop your files and get a code in seconds.
Features.receiveBody: Enter the code shared by your contact to download.
Features.expirationBody: Set a lifetime: 1h, 24h, 7 days or custom.
Features.protectionBody: Add a password to secure access to your files.

Send.title: Send files
Send.description: Drop your files and configure sharing options.
Send.totalTooLarge: The total size is too large (max {size}).
Send.filesSelected: {count, plural, =1 {# file selected} other {# files selected}}
Send.messagePlaceholder: Add a note for the recipient…

SendSuccess.title: Your code is ready
SendSuccess.description: Share this code (or the link) with your recipient.
SendSuccess.noCode: No code received. Please retry the upload.

Receive.title: Receive a file
Receive.description: Enter the code shared by the sender.

ReceiveCode.title: File(s) available
ReceiveCode.subtitle: Code {code}
ReceiveCode.notFound: This code does not exist or has expired.
ReceiveCode.error: Could not fetch the file. Please retry.

Login.title: Sign in
Login.description: Access your dashboard, history and shares.
Login.error: Could not sign in. Please retry.

Register.title: Create an account
Register.description: Groups, history, recurring shares and advanced control.
Register.firstAdminNotice: Creation of the first administrator account. This account will have full control over the instance.
Register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {min} characters.
Register.error: Could not create the account. Please retry.

Users.title: Users
Users.subtitle: Manage accounts, roles and access.
Users.loadErrorDescription: The server did not return the user list. Check that the API is reachable, then retry.
Users.forbiddenDescription: You need administrator privileges to manage users.
Users.passwordHint: Only filled in if you want to set a new password.
Users.editError: Could not save changes. Please retry.

Blocked.title: Account blocked
Blocked.description: Your account has been blocked by an administrator. You no longer have access to Flick. If you think this is a mistake, contact an administrator.

HowItWorks.title: Three steps, zero friction.
HowItWorks.step1Body: Drag your files into Flick. We handle the encrypted upload.
HowItWorks.step2Body: A short code is generated. Copy it, say it, send it in a message.
HowItWorks.step3Body: The recipient enters the code and grabs the file in one click.

CallToAction.title: Create an account for more
CallToAction.body: Groups, history, recurring shares and advanced control.
